help.title: Help & Glossary
help.subtitle: Definitions for terms used throughout Portfolio Tracker.
help.def.holding: An individual asset (stock, ETF, crypto, or cash) in your portfolio.
help.def.costBasis: The original purchase price per unit of an asset.
help.def.marketValue: Current price x quantity, converted to your base currency.
help.def.assetType: The category of an asset: Stock, ETF, Crypto, or Cash.
help.def.quantity: The number of units of an asset you hold.
help.def.gainLoss: The difference between current market value and your cost basis.
help.def.dailyPnl: Change in portfolio value since market open.
help.def.returnPct: Gain or loss as a percentage of your total cost basis.
help.def.weight: A holding's market value as a percentage of your total portfolio value.
help.def.dailyChangePct: The percentage change in an asset's price since the previous market close.
help.def.targetWeight: Your desired allocation percentage for a holding or asset class.
help.def.drift: The difference between a holding's current weight and its target weight.
help.def.rebalance: Adjusting holdings to bring allocations back to target weights.
help.def.overweight: A holding whose current weight exceeds its target weight.
help.def.underweight: A holding whose current weight is below its target weight.
help.def.drawdown: The peak-to-trough decline in portfolio value during a specific period.
help.def.volatility: The degree of variation in portfolio returns over time.
help.def.stressScenario: A hypothetical market shock applied to your holdings.
help.def.shockPct: The percentage change applied to an asset class or FX rate.
help.def.resilienceScore: A composite metric reflecting portfolio diversification.
help.def.baseCurrency: The currency in which your total portfolio value is displayed.
help.def.fxRate: Exchange rate between a holding's native currency and your base currency.
help.def.fxExposure: The portion of your portfolio held in foreign-currency assets.
help.def.costValueCad: Your cost basis converted to your base currency.
help.def.priceAlert: A notification triggered when an asset's price crosses a threshold.
help.def.alertCondition: The rule that triggers an alert.
help.def.dividend: A payment made by a company to shareholders.
help.def.yield: Annual dividend payment as a percentage of the current share price.
